content.text: do not change any code, please review why the terrain has some issues

Let me investigate the terrain system to understand what's going on.

<tool_call>
<tool_name>find</tool_name>
<parameters>
<argument name="pattern" type="string">*terrain*,*Terrain*,*chunk*,*Chunk*,*world*,*World*,*heightmap*,*HeightMap*</argument>
<argument name="path" type="string"></argument>
</parameters>
</tool_call>

<parameters>

<argument name="include" type="string">*.cs,*.gd,*.tscn</argument>
</parameters>
</tool_call>

</parameters>
